title: unnecessary Vec<String> clone in chat_delta_sync ids_to_fetch
description: client_task.rs lines 653-663: ids_to_fetch clones all Strings from changes.created and changes.updated into a new Vec<String>, then immediately builds id_refs: Vec<&str> from them. Since changes.created and changes.updated are both Vec<String> owned in the same scope, id_refs can be built directly via changes.created.iter().chain(changes.updated.iter()).map(String::as_str).collect::<Vec<&str>>(), eliminating O(k) string clones where k = number of changed chats. Low absolute impact (SSE event path, not frame-rate), but the clone is structurally unnecessary.
